common.restartToApply: , please restart the application for the configuration to take effect

general.title: General Settings
general.desc: Here, you can configure basic application settings, including interface theme, language and other options.

scale.title: Interface Scale
scale.desc: Adjust the overall scale of the application interface

contentTextScale.title: Content Scale
contentTextScale.desc: Adjust the text size in editor and chat Markdown content

fileManagerTextSize.title: File Manager Text Size
fileManagerTextSize.desc: Adjust the text size of file and folder lists in the file manager

recordTextSize.title: Record Text Size
recordTextSize.desc: Adjust the text size of record items in the record list

customCss.title: Custom CSS
customCss.desc: Add custom CSS styles to override the application's default styles
customCss.dialogDesc: Enter custom CSS code below to override the application's default styles. Click save to apply changes.

customTheme.title: Custom Theme Colors
customTheme.desc: Customize application theme colors including background, foreground, border, etc.
customTheme.dialogDesc: Configure custom theme colors. Color changes are saved and applied in real-time, overriding both light and dark themes.

export.title: Export Color Scheme
export.placeholder: Click the generate button to export current color scheme as code

import.title: Import Color Scheme
import.placeholder: Paste the JSON code of the color scheme

enabled.title: Enable Tray
enabled.desc: Choose to minimize to tray or close app when window is closed

chatToolbar.title: Chat Toolbar
chatToolbar.desc: Customize the display order and visibility of chat toolbar buttons
chatToolbar.dialogDesc: Drag tools to adjust order, use switches to show or hide

recordToolbar.title: Record Toolbar
recordToolbar.desc: Customize the display order and visibility of record toolbar buttons
recordToolbar.dialogDesc: Drag tools to adjust order, use switches to show or hide

rag.title: Knowledge Base
rag.desc: Here, you can configure knowledge base related settings, knowledge base based on RAG technology, through embedding models to convert text into vectors, then through vector search to achieve intelligent search and intelligent answers.
rag.settingsDesc: By adjusting parameters, you can more precisely control the retrieval effect of the knowledge base.
rag.deleteVectorConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the knowledge base?
rag.enableDesc: Enabling it will make AI search your notes when answering questions, providing more accurate answers.
rag.chunkSizeDesc: The maximum number of characters for text chunking. Larger chunks may contain more context, but will increase vector calculation complexity.
rag.chunkOverlapDesc: The number of overlapping characters between text chunks. Larger overlaps can maintain context continuity.
rag.resultCountDesc: The number of related documents returned when searching. The more documents, the more information provided, but may also introduce noise.
rag.similarityThresholdDesc: The minimum similarity threshold between documents and queries. Only documents exceeding this threshold will be returned. The value range is 0.0-1.0, the higher the threshold, the stricter the requirement.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.desc: Model Context Protocol allows AI to call external tools and access resources, extending AI capabilities.
mcp.enableDesc: When enabled, AI can call tools provided by configured MCP servers.
mcp.serversDesc: Manage MCP server configurations. Each server can provide different tools and resources.
mcp.serverEnabledDesc: When enabled, this server will automatically connect and provide tools.
mcp.argsDesc: Command line arguments, separated by spaces
mcp.envDesc: Environment variable configuration in JSON format
mcp.headersDesc: HTTP request headers in JSON format
mcp.deleteServerDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this server? This action cannot be undone.
mcp.jsonImportDesc: Paste the mcpServers configuration format for MCP servers
mcp.jsonInputHelp: Supports mcpServers format, automatically uses server name as key
mcp.jsonInvalidFormat: Invalid configuration format, must contain name and type fields
mcp.jsonInvalidType: Server type must be stdio or http
mcp.jsonMissingCommand: stdio type server must specify command
mcp.jsonMissingUrl: http type server must specify url

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: Skills are reusable AI capability packages that allow AI assistants to automatically apply specific behavioral patterns based on tasks.
skills.enableDesc: When enabled, AI can use configured Skills
skills.autoMatchDesc: Automatically select appropriate Skills based on user input
skills.importHelp: Support importing Skills in zip format. The zip file must contain a SKILL.md file.
skills.noSkillsDesc: Create or import Skills to get started
skills.noSkillsGlobalDesc: Create or import Skills to use across all projects
skills.emptyWorkspaceDesc: Create SKILL.md files in the skills folder to add Skills
skills.descriptionPlaceholder: Automatically organize and optimize note structure...
skills.descriptionHelp: Used for AI matching, describes the Skill's functionality and use cases
skills.allowedToolsHelp: These tools can be used without user confirmation
skills.instructionsHelp: Detailed instructions for AI, supports Markdown format
skills.deleteSkillDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this Skill? This action cannot be undone.

editor.title: Editor Settings
editor.desc: Here, you can customize the editor, creating a writing experience tailored to your needs.
editor.typewriterModeDesc: In typewriter mode, the editor will simulate a typewriter effect, helping you better immerse in writing.
editor.outlineEnableDesc: Enabling it will make the outline visible by default.
editor.pageViewDesc: In immersive view, the editor will reserve a large amount of blank space on both sides, and in panorama view, the editor content will occupy the entire editing area.
editor.enableLineNumberDesc: Enabling it will make the line number visible in code blocks.

model.title: Quick Completion Model
model.desc: Select the model for AI inline completion in editor

model.title: Commit Model
model.desc: For automatically generating Git commit messages based on file changes

record.title: Record Settings
record.desc: Configure record-related settings here, including record description and toolbar configuration.

markDesc.title: Record Description
markDesc.desc: For processing OCR-recognized records and generating record descriptions

recordToolbar.title: Record Toolbar
recordToolbar.desc: Customize the visibility and order of record toolbar buttons

scan.desc: Scan and recognize text from images

uploadStore.uploadConfirm: Upload configuration please ensure the sync repository is private, otherwise the data will be leaked!
uploadStore.downloadConfirm: Download configuration will cover local configuration and restart to take effect!

about.title: About
about.desc: A note-taking assistant focused on record and writing.
about.ignoreVersionSuccess: This version update has been ignored

home.title: Home
home.desc: Visit the website to learn more about NoteGen.

guide.title: Guide
guide.desc: View configuration guide, learn how to configure models, sync, etc. information.

github.title: GitHub
github.desc: If NoteGen helps you, please give a star to encourage!

releases.title: Update Log
releases.desc: View update log, learn more about NoteGen's updates.

issues.title: Issue Feedback
issues.desc: If you find a bug in NoteGen, please feedback here.

discussions.title: Discussions
discussions.desc: If you want to discuss with the author or other users, you can join the group discussion.

defaultModel.title: Default Model
defaultModel.desc: Here, you can use different models for different scenes, to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
defaultModel.placeholder: Please select or search for models

primaryModel.title: Main model
primaryModel.desc: As the main model for all scenarios, this model is used if other dialogue models do not select the default model.

markDesc.title: Record Description
markDesc.desc: Used to process records after OCR recognition, generating record descriptions.

placeholder.title: AI Suggestion
placeholder.desc: AI suggestion prompt for generating placeholder content in the record page AI conversation.

completion.title: Fast Completion
completion.desc: AI inline completion for Markdown editor, similar to GitHub Copilot, quickly generates continuation content.

commit.title: Auto Generate Commit Message
commit.desc: Used to automatically generate Git commit messages, intelligently generating descriptive commit messages based on file content changes.

embedding.title: Embedding Model
embedding.desc: Used for text embedding and vectorization scenarios.

reranking.title: Reranking Model
reranking.desc: Used for reordering and optimizing search results.

condense.title: Condense Model
condense.desc: Used to compress historical conversation content to save token usage

audio.title: Audio Settings
audio.desc: Here, you can configure audio settings, including text-to-speech (TTS) and speech-to-text (STT) functions.

tts.title: Text-to-Speech (TTS)
tts.desc: Configure read aloud functionality to provide voice playback for chat content.

model.title: TTS Model
model.desc: Select the AI model for text-to-speech conversion, supporting various voice types and parameter configurations.

speed.title: Speech Rate
speed.desc: Adjust the playback speed of the voice, ranging from 0.5x to 2x speed, with 1x being the normal speed.

stt.title: Speech-to-Text (STT)
stt.desc: Configure voice recognition to convert speech to text records.

mode.title: Recognition Mode
mode.desc: Choose between browser built-in recognition or AI model recognition

model.title: STT Model
model.desc: Select the AI model for speech recognition, supporting real-time voice-to-text conversion.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.desc: Here, you can add and manage prompts, helping AI better understand your needs.
prompt.addPromptDesc: Please enter the prompt name and content, helping AI better understand your needs.
prompt.optimizeFailed: Failed to optimize prompt, please try again later

sync.title: Sync
sync.desc: Here, you can configure the synchronization repository, which can help you synchronize records, markdown files, system configurations and other information.
sync.imageRepoDesc: Sync your images to repository, using jsdelivr for acceleration
sync.newTokenDesc: When creating a new token, please make sure to check the repo permission, and after configuration, it will automatically create a file repository (private) and an image repository.
sync.giteeTokenDesc: Gitee personal access token is used for data synchronization. It needs repository read and write permissions. After configuration, it will automatically create a file repository (private) and an image repository.
sync.imageRepoSettingDesc: You have already configured an image repository, you can choose to use the image repository or use local storage.
sync.autoSyncDesc: When enabled, the editor will automatically sync to GitHub 10 seconds after input stops
sync.giteeAutoSyncDesc: When enabled, the editor will automatically sync to Gitee 10 seconds after input stops
sync.customSyncRepoDesc: Leave empty to use default repository name
sync.customImageRepoDesc: Leave empty to use default repository name
sync.backupMethodDesc: After setting as the primary backup method, all sync-related functions in writing will use the current backup method (except for image hosting)
sync.gitlabInstanceTypeDesc: Select the type of GitLab instance to connect to

gitlabInstanceTypeOptions.selfHostedDesc: Enter your self-hosted GitLab server address (e.g., https://gitlab.example.com)

sync.gitlabAccessTokenDesc: Create a personal access token at {instanceDisplayName}, requires api permission
sync.giteaInstanceTypeDesc: Select the type of Gitea instance to connect to

giteaInstanceTypeOptions.selfHostedDesc: Enter your self-hosted Gitea server address (e.g., https://gitea.example.com)

sync.giteaAccessTokenDesc: Create a personal access token at {instanceDisplayName}, requires full repository permission

exclusions.title: Sync Exclusion Configuration
exclusions.desc: The following settings will not be synced across devices as they are device-specific
exclusions.reason: These settings may differ across devices, excluding them from sync prevents path errors and other issues

settingsSync.autoSync: Settings will be automatically synced during upload/download (excluding device-specific settings like workspace path)

imageHosting.title: Image Hosting
imageHosting.desc: Here, you can configure image hosting services for storing and managing your images.
imageHosting.customRepoNameDesc: Leave empty to use default repository name

token.desc: Please create and input SM.MS Token.

smms.error: Failed to get, please check network or Token is correct.

picgo.ok: Service is running, please ensure PicGo image hosting is configured.
picgo.error: Service is not running, please ensure PicGo (v2.2.0+) is running, otherwise image upload will fail.

github.title: GitHub Image Hosting
github.description: Use GitHub repository as image storage service
github.manualCreateDesc: Please follow these steps to create the image hosting repository:

createSteps.step1: Visit GitHub and log in to your account
createSteps.step2: Click the "+" button in the top right corner, select "New repository"
createSteps.step6: After creation, click the "Recheck" button below

s3.title: S3 Object Storage
s3.description: Configure AWS S3 or S3-compatible object storage service as image hosting
s3.endpointDesc: Leave empty for AWS S3, or enter S3-compatible service endpoint
s3.customDomainDesc: Optional, custom domain for accessing images
s3.pathPrefixDesc: Optional, path prefix for image storage
s3.requiredFields: Please fill in required fields: Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, Region and Bucket
s3.testSuccessDesc: S3 connection is working, ready to upload images
s3.testFailedDesc: Please check configuration and network connection
s3.testFirstDesc: Please test connection successfully before setting as primary
s3.setPrimarySuccessDesc: S3 has been set as primary image hosting

imageMethod.title: Image Recognition
imageMethod.desc: Here, you can configure image recognition related settings, supporting OCR and VLM two ways.

enable.title: Enable Image Recognition
enable.desc: When enabled, images will be automatically recognized during screenshot and image recording. When disabled, image recognition will be skipped.

ocr.title: OCR
ocr.checkModels: Here you can search all models

vlm.title: Visual Language Model
vlm.desc: Use visual language model to recognize image content.

backupSync.title: Backup Data
backupSync.desc: Here, you can use other methods to backup your data, you can regularly backup to ensure data security.

webdav.description: WebDAV is only used as a backup solution and does not support auto-sync, history rollback, and other features.
webdav.serverUrlDesc: Enter the URL of the WebDAV server No path included, e.g: https://dav.example.com http://192.8.8.88:9999
webdav.backupPathDesc: Backup path on the WebDAV server, e.g: /backup/notes
webdav.syncSuccessDesc: Synced {count} files from WebDAV to local.

error.pathNotFound: Path not found or server inaccessible.
error.connectionTimeOut: Connection timed out, please check network or server.

export.title: Export Backup
export.desc: Package application data into a .zip file and save to specified location.

import.title: Import Backup
import.desc: Restore application data from .zip file, will overwrite all current data.
import.warning: Import operation will overwrite all current data, please ensure important content is backed up!

localBackup.importSuccess: Backup imported successfully! Application will restart to apply changes.
localBackup.restartConfirm: Import completed! Restart application now to apply changes?

template.title: Template
template.desc: Here you can create and manage custom organization templates to help AI organize record content according to your needs.
template.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this template?
template.name: Name
template.addTemplateDesc: Please enter the custom template name and content, helping AI better understand your needs.

dev.title: Developer
dev.desc: Here you can configure developer options, including network proxy, data cleanup, and configuration file management.
dev.clearDataConfirm: Are you sure to clear data?
dev.proxy: Proxy, used to solve network problems, after configuration, it is recommended to restart the application.
dev.clearDataDesc: Clear data information, including system configuration and database (including records).
dev.clearFileDesc: Clear files, including images and articles.
dev.configFileDesc: Import and export configuration files. Importing will overwrite current configuration and take effect after restart.
dev.importConfigSuccessMobile: Config downloaded successfully, please restart the app manually

chat.title: Chat Settings
chat.desc: Configure chat-related settings here, including summary generation.

model.title: Primary Chat Model
model.desc: Select the main AI model for daily conversations

chatToolbar.title: Chat Toolbar
chatToolbar.desc: Customize the visibility and order of chat toolbar buttons

modelSelect.desc: Switch the AI model for conversation

promptSelect.desc: Select the preset prompt for the conversation

chatLanguage.desc: Set the language for the conversation

chatLink.title: Link Tag
chatLink.desc: Link note content of the current tag to conversation context

fileLink.desc: Link files or folders to the conversation context

mcpButton.desc: Select and connect MCP servers to use external tools

clearContext.desc: Clear conversation context, keep chat history

enable.title: Enable Summary
enable.desc: Automatically compress long conversations to save token usage

model.title: Summary Model
model.desc: Select the AI model for generating summaries

threshold.title: Trigger Threshold
threshold.desc: Check compression when AI messages exceed this count

minToken.title: Min Token Count
minToken.desc: Only compress messages exceeding this token count

keepLatest.title: Keep Latest
keepLatest.desc: Keep the latest N AI messages uncompressed

maxLength.title: Max Summary Length
maxLength.desc: Control the maximum word count of generated summaries

prompt.title: Custom Summary Prompt
prompt.desc: Customize the prompt template for generating summaries
prompt.label: Prompt Template
prompt.help: Use {content} as a placeholder for original content

ai.title: Model Management
ai.desc: Here, you can add and manage various custom model services. After configuration, you will unlock AI-related features, such as organization and conversation functions.
ai.modelConfigDesc: Every configuration corresponds to an AI model, you can create new configurations through templates or custom.
ai.providerInfoDesc: This configuration is created based on a provider template, with name and URL pre-configured.
ai.createDesc: Select an empty configuration or create a new configuration using the supplier template.

createSection.title: Custom Model Configuration
createSection.descWithoutModels: Add custom AI model configurations to use more powerful model services.

ai.deleteCustomModelConfirm: Are you sure to delete this custom model?
ai.modelSupport: Only supports AI models with OpenAI protocol

modelType.title: Model Type
modelType.desc: Select the type of AI model based on its capability

error.title: Failed to get model list
error.description: Please check if API Key or network is correct

ai.modelProviderDesc: Custom models only support AI models with OpenAI protocol.
ai.modelTitleDesc: Custom name, used to identify AI models, please do not repeat.
ai.modelBaseUrlDesc: You only need to configure the version number, for example: https://api.openai.com/v1, the suffix will be automatically added.
ai.modelDesc: Some models support getting model list, if not supported please manually configure.
ai.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness of output. Lower values make generated content more deterministic.
ai.topPDesc: A nucleus sampling method, where the model considers the results of tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only consider the top 10% probability mass. Usually we suggest to change this or temperature but not both.
ai.customHeadersDesc: Add custom HTTP headers with key-value pairs.
ai.voiceDesc: Specify the voice type for audio models, such as 'alloy', 'echo', 'fable', etc.

defaultModels.title: Default Free Models
defaultModels.desc: NoteGen provides free AI model services for users, enabling basic functionality without configuration.

chatModel.name: Qwen/Qwen3-8B
chatModel.desc: Suitable for daily conversations and text generation

embeddingModel.name: BAAI/bge-m3
embeddingModel.desc: Used for text vectorization and semantic search

visionModel.name: OpenGVLab/InternVL2-8B
visionModel.desc: Supports image understanding and visual Q&A

completionModel.name: Fast Completion
completionModel.desc: AI inline completion for Markdown editor, similar to GitHub Copilot, quickly generates continuation content

file.title: File Settings
file.desc: Here, you can manage workspace settings and other file-related options.

workspace.title: Workspace Settings
workspace.desc: Set the application's workspace directory where files will be saved

info.title: Workspace Information
info.desc: After changing the workspace, you need to restart the application for the changes to take full effect. Files in the new workspace will be displayed after restart.

toast.errorDesc: Unable to select workspace directory, please try again
toast.resetErrorDesc: Unable to reset to default workspace, please try again

assets.title: Assets Path
assets.desc: Set the path where resources (e.g. images, videos, files etc.) used in writing will be saved. Resources will be saved at the same level as the currently edited markdown file.
assets.select: Set the path where resources used in writing will be saved

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Here, you can configure shortcuts to help you use NoteGen more efficiently.

quickRecordText.title: Quick Record Text
quickRecordText.desc: Quickly open the main window and switch to text recording.

trash.title: Empty Trash
trash.confirm: Are you sure to empty the trash?

progress.newTokenDesc: New token must be configured with repo permission, configuration will automatically create file repository (private) and image repository.

text.title: Record Text
text.description: Record a piece of text, which will be inserted into the appropriate position when organizing notes.

link.title: Record Link
link.description: Enter a webpage link, and the system will automatically crawl the page content and save it

todo.title: Todo Record
todo.description: Create todo items to manage your tasks
todo.editDescription: Modify the details of the todo item

mark.emptyHint: Use the toolbar at the top to create your first record!

confirmation.description: The agent wants to perform the following action. Please confirm to continue.
